compiled_state.title: Onboarding-generated dso shim routes 'ticket' to ticket-cli.sh instead of ticket dispatcher
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: The dso shim template generated during onboarding routes ticket commands via: exec /opt/homebrew/bin/bash "$SCRIPTS_DIR/ticket-cli.sh" "$@". It should route to the v3 ticket dispatcher: exec /opt/homebrew/bin/bash "$SCRIPTS_DIR/ticket" "$@". This causes all ticket subcommands to fail after onboarding.

comments.body: Verification 2026-04-15: The current shim template (templates/host-project/dso) uses generic command dispatch (exec "$SCRIPT_PATH" "$@") — no ticket-cli.sh routing exists anywhere in the codebase. Bug already fixed by prior commits.
comments.author: Test
